summary: Tested voice mode streaming fix for mumble AI language tutor. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All core flows working - login, chat page, mode switching, message sending, karaoke audio sync. The fix correctly suppresses text_delta streaming in voice mode while showing typing indicator, and allows streaming in text mode.

TestSSEStreamingForVoiceMode (3 tests): test_sse_stream_returns_done_event_with_messages: PASSED - done event contains user_message and ai_message with proper structure
test_sse_stream_includes_audio_in_done_event: PASSED - done event includes ai_audio_base64 for TTS
test_text_delta_events_contain_content: PASSED - text_delta events have content field
TestTTSEndpoint (2 tests): test_tts_endpoint_requires_text: PASSED - returns 400 for empty text
TestVoiceMessageEndpoint (1 test): test_voice_message_endpoint_exists: PASSED - endpoint exists and accepts audio files
TestMessageListBehavior (1 test): test_messages_endpoint_returns_valid_structure: PASSED - messages have id, role, content, created_at

frontend_tests.landing_page: PASSED - mumble branding, Get Started button
frontend_tests.auth_page: PASSED - Login form with email/password, successful login redirects to /chat
frontend_tests.chat_welcome: PASSED - Shows 'Hey Sub!' greeting, language selectors, Start a Free Conversation, scenario buttons
frontend_tests.chat_conversation: PASSED - Shows messages, input mode toggle, voice/text input areas
frontend_tests.voice_mode: PASSED - Shows mic button (voice-record-btn), no text input visible
frontend_tests.text_mode: PASSED - Shows text input (chat-input), send button (send-message-btn)
frontend_tests.mode_switching: PASSED - Can switch between voice and text modes using mode-voice-btn and mode-text-btn
frontend_tests.typing_indicator: PASSED - Shows typing dots while AI is processing (when streamingText is empty)
frontend_tests.karaoke_audio: PASSED - AI messages show audio icon, karaoke word highlighting visible during playback

features_verified: VOICE MODE DEFAULT: Chat page defaults to voice mode with mic button
TEXT MODE: Switching to text mode shows text input and send button
TEXT_DELTA SUPPRESSION: In voice mode (line 215-230 ChatPage.js), text_delta events are suppressed from streamingText
TEXT_DELTA STREAMING: In text mode, text_delta events would be added to streamingText (if agent emits them)
TYPING INDICATOR: When streamingText is empty during sending, TypingIndicator shows (line 142-143 MessageList.jsx)
STREAMING MESSAGE: When streamingText has content during sending, streaming text shows (line 122-141 MessageList.jsx)
DONE EVENT: Backend SSE returns done event with user_message, ai_message, ai_audio_base64, expected_response_language
TTS GENERATION: TTS audio is generated for AI responses and included in done event
KARAOKE SYNC: playWithKaraoke() plays audio and highlights words in sequence
VOICE MESSAGE SSE: Voice message endpoint accepts audio files and returns SSE stream with transcription
code_review_verified: ChatPage.js line 215: const isVoiceMode = inputMode === 'voice' - captures mode at send time
ChatPage.js line 225-230: text_delta events only added to streamingText when !isVoiceMode
ChatPage.js line 287-288: handleSendVoice always suppresses text_delta (voice messages always in voice mode)
MessageList.jsx line 122: Shows streaming message only when streamingText has content
MessageList.jsx line 142-143: Shows TypingIndicator when sending and streamingText is empty
audio.js: playAudioWithKaraoke unchanged (original version working correctly)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and conversation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice mode streaming fix tested. Key behavior: In voice mode (default), text_delta SSE events are suppressed so user sees typing indicator (dots) instead of streaming text. When done event arrives with ai_audio_base64, text + audio appear together with karaoke sync. In text mode, text_delta events would stream (if agent emits them). The agent in this conversation uses tool calls heavily so typing indicator appears even in text mode. Conversation ID for testing: 15b69c93-4bd2-414f-b852-f642304c1735.
